meta.title: OpenAI Fine-tuning vs Distillation - Free Colab Notebook
meta.description:
➡️ Colab Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1aXoGCvRV6pWus63oy5kYDtkbyhXRf95a?usp=sharing
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the ADVANCED Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-fine-tuning
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

OTHER RESOURCES:
- Synthetic Data Preparation Video (more advanced techniques): https://youtu.be/iogrvDu5K0k
- Model Distillation from Scratch (relevant for pre-training more than fine-tuning): https://youtu.be/tf60owmwR-c
- Touch Rugby Synthetic Data: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/touch-rugby-synth

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Fine-tuning and Distilling with OpenAI
0:23 Video Overview and Colab Notebook
1:17 Why bother with distilling or fine-tuning?
2:48 How is distillation different to fine-tuning?
6:18 Simple Approach to Distillation
7:16 Installation, student and teacher model selection
7:58 Set up training questions
8:37 Setting up simple evaluation
9:41 Generating and storing a distilled dataset
11:43 Running fine-tuning on the distilled dataset
13:17 Evaluating the fine-tuned model
15:03 Advanced techniques to generate larger datasets
17:31 Results from comprehensive fine-tuning and distillation from got-4o to gpt-4o-mini
19:41 Notes on OpenAI Evals and Gemini fine-tuning
